_meta.purpose: Single home of every pipeline parameter. Code reads values from here only; no number is duplicated in code or docs.
_meta.splits_note: Calendar-round boundaries on purpose: warmup = all of 2016 (indicator/window warm-up only), train = 2017..2023, OOS = 2024-01-01..2026-04-30 (full months). OOS is read exactly once, at the end of run_asset.

_barrier_note: Asymmetric ATR Triple Barrier from the momentum-direction entry: TP = TB_ATR_TP*ATR14, SL = TB_ATR_SL*ATR14. Reward:risk b = TB_ATR_TP/TB_ATR_SL shapes the label geometry (one 2xATR win covers two 1xATR losses). Under CAPITAL_MODE=all_in every trade reinvests the full running capital; b no longer feeds a sizing formula (the previous Kelly-epoch used it in f=clip(lambda*(p-(1-p)/b),0,cap)).

ENTRY_GATE._note: Meta-labeling PRIMARY filter — a fixed, Train-only, causal (features at t0) rule that keeps only higher-conviction setups so the LSTM secondary is not flooded with noise. (a) trend agreement: the momentum-direction entry must agree in sign with the trend proxy; (b) significant move: |momentum| >= vol_floor_k * realized_volatility_20. enabled=false reproduces the original every-bar candidate set byte-for-byte. Parameters are NOT per-asset tuned (no gate overfitting).

_capital_mode_note: kelly_fractional_compounding = per-trade f = clip(lambda*(p-(1-p)/b), 0, cap); all_in_compounding_per_asset = every trade reinvests the FULL current capital (f=1, the same capital game as buy-and-hold). HPO and the D8 gate score with the sizing they will trade.

OPERATING_SPACE._note: SSOT of the deployable Train-OOF operating space — ONE theta spectrum + ONE trade floor + ONE robustness contract shared by D7 HPO scoring, the feature search and D8 calibration (no grid drift; selection via iterators/op_select.py, accumulate-then-select — never a per-fold best theta). The FULL 0.02 grid is shared by scoring and calibration (engine replays on cached OOF predictions are nearly free here). min_oof_trades: a point below this Train-OOF trade floor cannot win anywhere (min-2-trades mandate; Train-OOF ONLY, never post-hoc OOS). min_active_folds / max_fold_trade_share: the calibrated point must earn its trades in >= min_active_folds folds with no single fold holding more than max_fold_trade_share of them; relaxation is flagged fold_spread_relaxed, never silent. Selection prefers the interior of the one-SE plateau over a spectrum edge; an edge choice is flagged theta_boundary (audit).

GATE_CALIBRATION._note: D8 chooses the per-asset operating point (theta, direction_mode; lambda under the previous Kelly-epoch) jointly on Train out-of-fold log-growth over OPERATING_SPACE (the SSOT above). Only the Kelly-epoch lambda geometry remains here; under CAPITAL_MODE=all_in sizing is fixed at full capital (lambda=None).

FEATURE_SEARCH._note: S.1-LSTM per-asset feature selection with an OVERFIT GATE. A light FIXED arch scores subsets on ONE common event set/fold partition (superset-eligible) by 'metric' (default oof_log_growth: the out-of-fold log-growth at ONE shared floor-respecting operating point over OPERATING_SPACE via iterators/op_select.py — never a per-fold best theta — so features are picked for DEPLOYABLE tradeability, consistent with the profit-aligned HPO; 'auc_pr' is the ranking-metric fallback). Each fold's score is averaged over eval_seeds independent weight inits, so a subset's score reflects the FEATURES not one lucky seed. A feature is a candidate only if its marginal gain >= min_feature_gain AND it helps in >= min_fold_win_frac of folds (robust edge). Two-stage family-first greedy (golden-family-v2): stage 1 sees ONLY family representatives; stage 2 probes the remaining variants of ACCEPTED families (marginal-vs-current-subset, at most family_variant_cap per family). min_trades = the A3 economic-power floor on the baseline's Train-CV trades (result-affecting -> lives HERE, in the recipe identity, not as a code default). A subset is APPLIED only if it beats core by min_gain. max_select caps additions.

HPO._note: D7 selects the LSTM architecture by TRADEABLE Train OOF log-growth (objective below), not AUC-PR, so the searched hyper-parameters serve profit. weight_decay (Adam L2) + num_layers are the regularization/capacity levers that most reduce the Train->OOS gap. Each trial is scored at ONE shared floor-respecting operating point over OPERATING_SPACE (accumulate-then-select via iterators/op_select.py); the FINE point (with robustness constraints) is chosen at D8 on the same spectrum.
